blaze.short_effect: Strengthens Fire moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

clear-body.short_effect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

flame-body.short_effect: Has a 30% chance of burning attacking Pokémon on contact.

forecast.short_effect: Changes Castform's type and form to match the weather.

magnet-pull.short_effect: Prevents Steel opponents from fleeing or switching out.

rough-skin.short_effect: Damages attacking Pokémon for 1/8 their max HP on contact.

sand-stream.short_effect: Summons a sandstorm that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.
